_description: Example configuration for corporate environments with MITM proxies and complex CA hierarchies
_security_warning: This configuration reduces TLS security for compatibility. Review docs/TLS-NUCLEAR-OPTIONS.md
_approval_required: DO NOT USE without security team approval and documented justification

tls_compatibility._scenario: Corporate MITM proxy with 3-4 level CA hierarchy
tls_compatibility._justification: Acme Corp BlueCoat proxy intercepts TLS and uses custom 4-level CA chain (ticket #12345)
tls_compatibility._explanation_depth: Depth 2 = validates leaf cert + 2 intermediates, stops before root
tls_compatibility._explanation_incomplete: Proxy doesn't send full chain, registry builds from cache
